name: Content Summarizer
description: Intelligent summarizer supporting 8 input types: audio, video, online videos (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, etc.), PDF, images, web pages, and text documents. Auto-transcribes, detects content scenarios, generates structured Markdown reports and mind map PNGs.

fields.label: Transcription API Key
fields.description: OpenAI-compatible API key for audio/video transcription (supports OpenAI Whisper, Deepgram, etc.). Only needed for audio/video content; PDF, images, web pages, and text don't require this.

fields.label: Transcription API Base URL
fields.description: Transcription API endpoint. Leave blank to use OpenAI. Fill in the address for other compatible services.
